name: Chicken Salad III
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle lemon juice over diced apples.
2. Add remaining ingredients to a large bowl and mix lightly.
3. Press the mixture into a 1 1/2 quart bowl.
4. Chill for several hours.
5. Unmold the salad on a serving platter.
6. Frost (recipe follows) and garnish as desired.
7. Combine softened cream cheese and salad dressing, mixing well until blended.
8. Frost the chicken salad using a small metal spatula.
